div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: The following artifacts define the specific capabilities that different types of systems are expected to have in order to comply with this implementation guide. Systems conforming to this implementation guide are expected to declare conformance to one or more of the following capability statements.
These are custom operations that can be supported by and/or invoked by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define the properties by which a RESTful server can be searched. They can also be used for sorting and including related resources.
These define data models that represent the domain covered by this implementation guide in more business-friendly terms than the underlying FHIR resources.
These define forms used by systems conforming to this implementation guide to capture or expose data to end users.
These define constraints on FHIR resources for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define sets of codes used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define new code systems used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These are example instances that show what data produced and consumed by systems conforming with this implementation guide might look like.

µŁż CapabilityStatement Õ«ÜńŠ®õ║åńö©µłČń½»’╝łClient’╝ēµćēµö»µÅ┤ńÜä FHIR RESTful API ÕŖ¤ĶāĮŃĆéńö©µłČń½»Õ╗║ĶŁ░µćēĶ®▓’╝łSHOULD’╝ēõĮ┐ńö©õ╝║µ£Źń½»ĶāĮÕŖøĶü▓µśÄõĖŁńÜäµ¤źĶ®óÕÅāµĢĖ’╝īµö»µÅ┤Ķ«ĆÕÅ¢ÕÆīµ¤źĶ®óõĖĆÕĆŗµł¢ÕżÜÕĆŗ FHIR ProfileŃĆé
µŁż CapabilityStatement Õ«ÜńŠ®õ║åõ╝║µ£Źń½»Õ┐ģķĀłµö»µÅ┤ńÜä FHIR RESTful API ÕŖ¤ĶāĮ
Return administrations of this medication code
Return administrations that share this encounter or episode of care
Return administrations with this administration device identity
Date administration happened (or did not happen)
Return administrations with this external identifier
Return administrations of this medication resource
The identity of a patient to list administrations for
The identity of the individual who administered the medication
Reasons for not administering the medication
The identity of a request to list administrations from
MedicationAdministration event status (for example one of active/paused/completed/nullified)
The identity of the individual or group to list administrations for
